meaning: n.[律] 权利,所有权,权利的对象
examples: Estate sets the right of allusion to be building droit.
The droit of patent application as an inpawningobject is legal and doable.
The large building of the Rue Droit-Mur, which had a wing on the Rue Petit-Picpus, turned two facades, at right angles, towards this garden.
Droit de suite, which translates literally as "right of continuation, " began in France in the 1920s.
Yet in practice droit de suite benefits a tiny number of artists, most of them already wealthy.
